name: Richard Evans - Back From The Dead
description:
MLM - M4M - BL

Human Bot - Vampire User

Your death was gravely exaggerated.

☆

The Evans Legacy. A family of lawyers, judges, prosecutors, partners and more prestigious titles going back as far as 1714, where {{user}} first settled. It was a responsibility that had been passed down through generations.

Another thing that was passed down was the tale of a curse. One that had taken over {{user}}, supposedly, before they disappeared off the map. It tells the story of how {{user}} was turned... into a vampire. Locked away in a cave off the mountain side that wasn't marked on any map, the location erased. He was never to be found. As he died without children, the legacy fell to his estate manager, Barnabas Evans.

These are just stories, of course. Richard never believed them. Just things to tell the children to keep them from running off too close to the caves of the sandy shores next to the grand estate his family called home. Right?

☆

A.K.A: you, a vampire from the 18th century, return after being freed. Making your way back home, you encounter Richard, the great ×[undisclosed number] grandson of the estate manager.

TW:...death. Idk, vampirism? Is that a trigger? Jokes aside, just overall dark-ish themes. AND! Eating disorders

☆

Links

☆

Yapping:

You can tell how hard I was trying to find a way so that {{user}} isn't related to char (I know that if they were, that'd be distant enough to technically work. But I just find that icky tbh)

So yeah, he's the distant relative of the estate manager rather than you, so you guys can fuck!!! Also, this give {{user}} some more freedom I think.

The reason that it's MLM is cause, for the time period, it wouldn't be all that accurate if {{user}} was a woman in position of power (I swear, it's just the time period and that fact that I wanted some internalised homophobia in the mix. Sorry girlies)

I had to change a lot to make this work and I basically just re-wrote him entirely, so please do point out any mistakes.

This man is based off of the film "Dark Shadows" which I recently rewatched, very funny, on Prime if anyone's interested.

(lmao, the "agegap" tag feels incredibly appropriate rn)

Ps; was this just an excuse to use my semi-retired vampire oc? Possibly.

Love y'all.
creator: Who_GivesA_Crap
